questions.question: What is the primary difference between a 'must-have' requirement and a 'nice-to-have' requirement when setting capacity goals for IT systems?
questions.hint: Consider how each type of requirement affects capacity planning

questions.question: An organization has three e-commerce systems with average daily usage of 500 concurrent users. The systems have a utilization threshold of 80%. What type of requirement will require a larger increase in capacity to meet, and why?
questions.hint: Consider the implications of the utilization threshold

questions.question: A business analyst is tasked with determining the required capacity of a new HR system. The system must support 1000 concurrent users at 90% utilization. What measurement(s) should the analyst use to determine the required capacity, and why?
questions.hint: Consider the factors that affect capacity planning
